# Coldstone Soap Co.
> Handcrafted cold process soap from a veteran-owned small-batch maker in the United States.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/): Coldstone Soap Co. brand overview, process, product collection, customer trust points, and newsletter access.
- [Shop](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/shop): Public catalog of handmade cold process soap bars.
- [FAQ](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/faq): Answers about cold process soap, handmade bar variation, shipping, returns, soap care, and the Soap Calculator.

## Products
- [Black Granite](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/products/black-granite): Activated charcoal and tea tree essential oil cold process soap bar.
- [Stone Forge](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/products/stone-forge): Cedar and sage essential oil cold process soap bar in a triple-butter base.

## Learning Resources
- [Blog](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/blog): Soapmaking notes, ingredient guides, grooming tips, and behind-the-batch writing.
- [Soapmaking Lesson Library](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making): Public guided lesson modules for the soapmaking community with chapter notes, SoapAbacus checkpoints, safety guidance, recommended bench practices, and printable checklists.
- [Soap Making 101](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/soap-making-101-beginners-guide): Beginner path for method choice, safety, ingredients, tools, first project planning, and batch records.
- [Cold Process Soap Making Guide](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/cold-process-soap-making-guide): Guided cold process workflow with lye safety, formula checks, trace, pour, cure, and batch improvement.
- [Hot Process Soap Making Guide](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/hot-process-soap-making-guide): Hot process guide covering heat, lye safety, cook stages, additives, mold, cure, and troubleshooting.
- [Melt and Pour Soap Making Notes](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/melt-and-pour-soap-making-notes): Melt and pour workflow for base selection, heat control, additives, layers, wrapping, and next-step formula learning.
- [Lye and Oil Ratio Chart](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/lye-and-oil-ratio-quick-reference-chart): Reference module explaining why ratio charts are not recipes and how to verify formulas in SoapAbacus.
- [Essential Oils for Soap Making](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/essential-oils-for-soap-making-quick-reference-chart): Essential oil workflow for IFRA limits, supplier documents, blending, testing, and gram conversion.
- [Fragrance Oils Guide](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/fragrance-oils-guide): Fragrance oil workflow for supplier documents, usage rates, acceleration, design choice, and cure records.
- [Colorants and Natural Additives](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/colorants-and-natural-additives-notes): Colorant and additive workflow for sourcing, dispersion, trace effects, gel, cure, and batch documentation.
- [Exfoliants in Soap](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/exfoliants-in-soap-printable-chart): Exfoliant reference for use case, particle size, rate, suspension, pour timing, and printable chart records.
- [Soap Recipe Template Guide](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/soap-recipe-template-guide): Batch template module for formula identity, oils, lye, additives, scent documents, color, trace, cure, and QC.
- [Specialty Soap Recipes Guide](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/specialty-soap-recipes-guide): Specialty soap module for milk, sugars, minerals, botanicals, alternate liquids, scent systems, and collection evaluation.
- [Swirling and Layering Techniques](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/swirling-and-layering-techniques-guide): Design technique module for slow-moving formulas, color maps, trace targets, layering, swirling, gel, cut, and QC.
- [Soap Troubleshooting Guide](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/soap-troubleshooting-guide): Troubleshooting module for triage, batter behavior, heat, surface defects, texture failures, fragrance issues, rescue methods, and formula prevention.
- [Soap Packaging and Branding Notes](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/soap-making/soap-packaging-and-branding-notes): Packaging module for protection, brand system, materials, claim boundaries, label design, product architecture, and shipping tests.
- [What Is Cold Process Soap?](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/blog/what-is-cold-process-soap): Guide to cold process soap and saponification.
- [Why Handmade Soap Needs to Cure](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/blog/why-handmade-soap-needs-to-cure): Explanation of soap cure time and bar longevity.
- [Activated Charcoal Soap](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/blog/activated-charcoal-soap-what-it-is): Practical guide to activated charcoal in handmade soap.
- [Cedar and Sage Soap](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/blog/cedar-and-sage-earthy-soap-bar): How cedar and sage shape an earthy soap profile.
- [Make a Bar Last Longer](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/blog/make-a-bar-last-longer): Soap care tips for drainage, storage, and daily use.
- [Use a Soap Calculator](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/blog/use-a-soap-calculator-without-guessing): Beginner guide to soap calculator inputs and recipe planning.

## Policies and Support
- [Shipping](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/shipping): Domestic fulfillment expectations and carrier notes.
- [Returns](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/returns): Return and issue-resolution policy for handmade soap orders.
- [Privacy](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/privacy): Customer, newsletter, checkout, analytics, and website data handling.
- [Terms](https://www.coldstonesoap.com/terms): Terms for using the site, shopping, and free tools.

## Contact
- Email: hello@coldstonesoapco.com
- Website: https://www.coldstonesoap.com/
